name: Button
description: Versatile button with variants, sizes, icons, and loading states.

api.name: Button
api.description: Versatile button with variants, sizes, icons, and loading states.

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: The button's label content. Hidden in favor of LoadingText while IsLoading is true (unless LoadingText is null).

parameters.name: LeftIcon
parameters.description: Icon rendered before ChildContent. Hidden while IsLoading is true (replaced by the spinner).

parameters.name: RightIcon
parameters.description: Icon rendered after ChildContent. Still shown while IsLoading is true.

parameters.name: Variant
parameters.description: Visual style. Defaults to Default (solid primary color).

parameters.name: Size
parameters.description: Button height/padding. Defaults to Default. Combines with Density to pick the final height.

parameters.name: Density
parameters.description: Per-button density override. When null, the button inherits from any ancestor DensityScope; if neither is set, behaviour matches the historical Comfortable default. Only padding / row-height shifts between values — text size + radius are governed by Size.

parameters.name: FullWidth
parameters.description: When true, the button stretches to fill its container's width (w-full). Default is false.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the root button/anchor element.

parameters.name: OnClick
parameters.description: Invoked on click, after any cascaded trigger's own activation (Popover/Dropdown/Dialog AsChild) has run.

parameters.name: Disabled
parameters.description: Disables the button. On the <a> render path (see Href) this maps to aria-disabled plus non-interactive styling instead of a native disabled attribute.

parameters.name: IsLoading
parameters.description: When true, shows a spinner in place of LeftIcon and disables interaction (pointer-events-none), without visually dimming like Disabled.

parameters.name: LoadingText
parameters.description: Text shown next to the spinner while IsLoading is true. When null, ChildContent stays visible alongside the spinner instead.

parameters.name: Href
parameters.description: When set, the button renders as an <a href> styled exactly like a button — the Blazor-idiomatic polymorphism for the common "link that looks like a button" case (#269). All visual props (Variant/Size/icons) still apply; Disabled/IsLoading map to aria-disabled + non-interactive styling since a link can't be natively disabled. Leave null for a normal <button>.

parameters.name: Type
parameters.description: HTML button type. Defaults to Button — explicitly NOT submit. The HTML spec says <button> inside <form> defaults to type="submit", which would submit the form on every click. Lumeo defaults to a regular button so Buttons don't silently submit EditForm; opt in via Type="Submit".

parameters.name: StopPropagation
parameters.description: Stop click propagation to ancestors. Use this instead of the Razor directive @@onclick:stopPropagation on a Lumeo component — that directive creates an onclick parameter that case-insensitively collides with the OnClick parameter, producing a compile error. The directive only works natively on HTML elements; this parameter is the equivalent for the <button> element underneath.

parameters.name: PreventDefault
parameters.description: Prevent the default click action on the underlying <button> element. Same rationale as StopPropagation — Razor's @@onclick:preventDefault directive collides case-insensitively with the OnClick parameter on components.

parameters.name: PressEffect
parameters.description: Visual feedback when the button is pressed down. Default is None (no press animation — original behaviour).

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Unmatched attributes are splatted onto the root button/anchor element.

events.name: OnClick
events.description: Invoked on click, after any cascaded trigger's own activation (Popover/Dropdown/Dialog AsChild) has run.

enums.name: ButtonPressEffect
enums.description: Visual press feedback style for Button.

examples.title: With Icon
examples.code:
<Button>
    <SvgGlyph Svg="@(Lucide.Mail)" class="h-4 w-4" />
    Login with Email
</Button>
<Button Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Secondary">
    <SvgGlyph Svg="@(Lucide.Loader2)" class="h-4 w-4 animate-spin" />
    Please wait
</Button>

slots.name: ChildContent
slots.description: The button's label content. Hidden in favor of LoadingText while IsLoading is true (unless LoadingText is null).

slots.name: LeftIcon
slots.description: Icon rendered before ChildContent. Hidden while IsLoading is true (replaced by the spinner).

slots.name: RightIcon
slots.description: Icon rendered after ChildContent. Still shown while IsLoading is true.

mdSummary:
# Button

Versatile button with variants, sizes, icons, and loading states.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Forms/Buttons & Actions
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/button

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Button | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` | The button's label content. Hidden in favor of LoadingText while IsLoading is true (unless LoadingText is null). |
| Button | LeftIcon | `RenderFragment?` | `` | Icon rendered before ChildContent. Hidden while IsLoading is true (replaced by the spinner). |
| Button | RightIcon | `RenderFragment?` | `` | Icon rendered after ChildContent. Still shown while IsLoading is true. |
| Button | Variant | `ButtonVariant` | `ButtonVariant.Default` | Visual style. Defaults to Default (solid primary color). |
| Button | Size | `ButtonSize` | `ButtonSize.Default` | Button height/padding. Defaults to Default. Combines with Density to pick the final height. |
| Button | Density | `Density?` | `` | Per-button density override. When null, the button inherits from any ancestor DensityScope; if neither is set, behaviour matches the historical Comfortable default. Only padding / row-height shifts between values — text size + radius are governed by Size. |
| Button | InheritedDensity | `Density?` | `` |  |
| Button | FullWidth | `bool` | `false` | When true, the button stretches to fill its container's width (w-full). Default is false. |
| Button | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the root button/anchor element. |
| Button | OnClick | `EventCallback<Microsoft.AspNetCore.Components.Web.MouseEventArgs>` | `` | Invoked on click, after any cascaded trigger's own activation (Popover/Dropdown/Dialog AsChild) has run. |
| Button | Disabled | `bool` | `false` | Disables the button. On the \<a\> render path (see Href) this maps to aria-disabled plus non-interactive styling instead of a native disabled attribute. |
| Button | IsLoading | `bool` | `false` | When true, shows a spinner in place of LeftIcon and disables interaction (pointer-events-none), without visually dimming like Disabled. |
| Button | LoadingText | `string?` | `` | Text shown next to the spinner while IsLoading is true. When null, ChildContent stays visible alongside the spinner instead. |
| Button | Href | `string?` | `` | When set, the button renders as an \<a href\> styled exactly like a button — the Blazor-idiomatic polymorphism for the common "link that looks like a button" case (#269). All visual props (Variant/Size/icons) still apply; Disabled/IsLoading map to aria-disabled + non-interactive styling since a link can't be natively disabled. Leave null for a normal \<button\>. |
| Button | Type | `ButtonType` | `ButtonType.Button` | HTML button type. Defaults to Button — explicitly NOT submit. The HTML spec says \<button\> inside \<form\> defaults to type="submit", which would submit the form on every click. Lumeo defaults to a regular button so Buttons don't silently submit EditForm; opt in via Type="Submit". |
| Button | StopPropagation | `bool` | `false` | Stop click propagation to ancestors. Use this instead of the Razor directive @@onclick:stopPropagation on a Lumeo component — that directive creates an onclick parameter that case-insensitively collides with the OnClick parameter, producing a compile error. The directive only works natively on HTML elements; this parameter is the equivalent for the \<button\> element underneath. |
| Button | PreventDefault | `bool` | `false` | Prevent the default click action on the underlying \<button\> element. Same rationale as StopPropagation — Razor's @@onclick:preventDefault directive collides case-insensitively with the OnClick parameter on components. |
| Button | PressEffect | `ButtonPressEffect` | `ButtonPressEffect.None` | Visual feedback when the button is pressed down. Default is None (no press animation — original behaviour). |
| Button | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` | Unmatched attributes are splatted onto the root button/anchor element. |
| Button | Slot | `TriggerSlot?` | `` |  |

## Slots
- `ChildContent` (Button) — The button's label content. Hidden in favor of LoadingText while IsLoading is true (unless LoadingText is null).
- `LeftIcon` (Button) — Icon rendered before ChildContent. Hidden while IsLoading is true (replaced by the spinner).
- `RightIcon` (Button) — Icon rendered after ChildContent. Still shown while IsLoading is true.

## Events
- `OnClick` (`EventCallback<Microsoft.AspNetCore.Components.Web.MouseEventArgs>`) — Invoked on click, after any cascaded trigger's own activation (Popover/Dropdown/Dialog AsChild) has run.

## Sub-components
- (none)

## Cascading values it expects
- `InheritedDensity` (`Density?`)
- `Slot` (`TriggerSlot?`)

## Services it injects
- `IComponentInteropService` (Lumeo.Services)

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<Button />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-accent`, `--color-accent-foreground`, `--color-background`, `--color-destructive`, `--color-destructive-foreground`, `--color-input`, `--color-primary`, `--color-primary-foreground`, `--color-ring`, `--color-secondary`, `--color-secondary-foreground`, `--radius`

## Files
- `UI/Button/Button.razor`
